I spoke with Kim Hundle and deal 458802 is not with EES I wasn't sure if I had wrote the number down wrong or not. Sorry. I also spoke with Neil Bresnan after we had spoke and he had said it should be no problem getting you on the list. I will check again and I apologize for the delay. Thanks Judy Forwarded by Judy Dyer/HOU/EES on 02/14/2001 12:21 PM Jubran Whalan 11/14/2000 02:43 PM
